modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: No audio or video output from Mac in classroom setup

full_description_text: 
User reports no sound from Mac when set as main system sound. 
Also, no video or colored display on projector or TV. 
HDMI cable used but no audio through room speakers. 
Issues with audio and technology in classroom environment.
short_description: No audio or video output from Mac in classroom setup
description:
